## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ChessBishop;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ChessBishop { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
mitre, miter, piece, board game, religion

## Categories
gaming, emoji
